name: WellnessNudge
description: Contextual micro-tip card that nudges learners to stretch, hydrate, breathe, or reset.

defaultData.label: Stretch
defaultData.headline: Shoulders up, shoulders down
defaultData.body: Take 20 seconds to roll your shoulders and release tension before the next task.
defaultData.note: Best after long typing or quiz sessions.

defaultData.label: Water
defaultData.headline: Refill before round two
defaultData.body: A quick water break can reset attention more effectively than forcing through fatigue.

defaultData.label: Breathe
defaultData.headline: Try one slow breath set
defaultData.body: Inhale for four, exhale for six, and let the pace of the session slow down with you.

name: DyslexiaFontToggle

defaultData.label: Default
defaultData.headline: Standard reading view
defaultData.body: Paragraph spacing and word shape stay consistent with the product default.
defaultData.note: Use when no extra support is needed.

defaultData.label: OpenDyslexic
defaultData.headline: Dyslexia-friendly mode

defaultData.note: Pair with shorter line lengths for best results.

defaultData.label: High spacing

defaultData.body: Increase character and line spacing without changing the primary typeface.
defaultData.note: Useful for gradual onboarding into accessibility settings.

defaultData.label: Default quiz

defaultData.label: Linearized

defaultData.label: Review mode
defaultData.headline: Answer review
defaultData.body: Correctness, selected choice, and explanation are announced in a single pass after submit.
